content.text:
Based on the zoomed view of atom C:28, I can clearly identify its covalently connected neighbour atoms.

**Neighbour atoms of C:28 (Carbon, atomic index 28):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| N:26 | Nitrogen |
| C:27 | Carbon |
| C:29 | Carbon |
| H:33 | Hydrogen |

**geomconf_index:** 9072

Atom C:28 is part of an aromatic ring system and is covalently bonded to three atoms in the ring (one nitrogen and two carbons) and one hydrogen atom attached to it.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 28, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
